article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.2. Attachment 1 - Gaming Reserve - Summary by Year from 2000-2025 2026-02-24.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Gaming Reserve Financial Summary 2000–2025
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review a financial summary of its Gaming Reserve — a special fund built from casino revenue — covering 2000 to 2025. The report shows the reserve has received nearly $239M in casino grants and spent over $258M on city capital and operating projects over that period.
briefs.action_required: Review the report if your business depends on city-funded capital projects or community grants.
